title: Permission denied when using host volume bind on windows
body:
### Issue Description

Getting error when trying to run mysql container with host volume ( windows ) bind.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/abb69504-1e33-40af-9e0b-a4749b66d3ca)

2025-04-09 07:44:45+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Entrypoint script for MySQL Server 9.2.0-1.el9 started.
2025-04-09 07:44:45+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Switching to dedicated user 'mysql'
2025-04-09 07:44:45+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Entrypoint script for MySQL Server 9.2.0-1.el9 started.
2025-04-09 07:44:46+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Initializing database files
2025-04-09T07:44:46.213860Z 0 [System] [MY-015017] [Server] MySQL Server Initialization - start.
�2025-04-09T07:44:46.215344Z 0 [System] [MY-013169] [Server] /usr/sbin/mysqld (mysqld 9.2.0) initializing of server in progress as process 76
�2025-04-09T07:44:46.223988Z 0 [Warning] [MY-010159] [Server] Setting lower_case_table_names=2 because file system for /var/lib/mysql/ is case insensitive
2025-04-09T07:44:46.233335Z 1 [System] [MY-013576] [InnoDB] InnoDB initialization has started.
2025-04-09T07:44:47.493059Z 1 [System] [MY-013577] [InnoDB] InnoDB initialization has ended.
mysqld: Cannot change permissions of the file 'ca.pem' (OS errno 1 - Operation not permitted)
2025-04-09T07:44:49.791887Z 0 [ERROR] [MY-010295] [Server] Could not set file permission for ca.pem
�2025-04-09T07:44:49.791962Z 0 [ERROR] [MY-013236] [Server] The designated data directory /var/lib/mysql/ is unusable. You can remove all files that the server added to it.
2025-04-09T07:44:49.791970Z 0 [ERROR] [MY-010119] [Server] Aborting
2025-04-09T07:44:51.371226Z 0 [System] [MY-015018] [Server] MySQL Server Initialization - end.







### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.  podman pull docker.io/library/mysql:latest
2. create a directory in windows c drive in my case C:/pk-workspace/mysql_data
3. podman run --name mysql-container -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=my_sql_pwd -d -p 3306:3306 -v /mnt/c/pk-workspace/mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql:z mysql:latest



### Describe the results you received

getting permission denied issue when running mysql container with volume mount from host machine.

2025-04-09 07:44:45+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Entrypoint script for MySQL Server 9.2.0-1.el9 started.
2025-04-09 07:44:45+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Switching to dedicated user 'mysql'
2025-04-09 07:44:45+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Entrypoint script for MySQL Server 9.2.0-1.el9 started.
2025-04-09 07:44:46+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Initializing database files
2025-04-09T07:44:46.213860Z 0 [System] [MY-015017] [Server] MySQL Server Initialization - start.
�2025-04-09T07:44:46.215344Z 0 [System] [MY-013169] [Server] /usr/sbin/mysqld (mysqld 9.2.0) initializing of server in progress as process 76
�2025-04-09T07:44:46.223988Z 0 [Warning] [MY-010159] [Server] Setting lower_case_table_names=2 because file system for /var/lib/mysql/ is case insensitive
2025-04-09T07:44:46.233335Z 1 [System] [MY-013576] [InnoDB] InnoDB initialization has started.
2025-04-09T07:44:47.493059Z 1 [System] [MY-013577] [InnoDB] InnoDB initialization has ended.
mysqld: Cannot change permissions of the file 'ca.pem' (OS errno 1 - Operation not permitted)
2025-04-09T07:44:49.791887Z 0 [ERROR] [MY-010295] [Server] Could not set file permission for ca.pem
�2025-04-09T07:44:49.791962Z 0 [ERROR] [MY-013236] [Server] The designated data directory /var/lib/mysql/ is unusable. You can remove all files that the server added to it.
2025-04-09T07:44:49.791970Z 0 [ERROR] [MY-010119] [Server] Aborting
2025-04-09T07:44:51.371226Z 0 [System] [MY-015018] [Server] MySQL Server Initialization - end.







### Describe the results you expected

mysql container should be up and running without any permission issue

### podman info output

```yaml
podman version 5.4.1
Windows 11 64 Bit X86 arch
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

WSL 2

comments.body: @l0rd PTAL. You're probably the right person for this.
@praveen-kumar-tech btw, we now have v5.4.2. Can you please check if this still occurs with that?

@praveen-kumar-tech a few notes:
- you can use the Windows path (`C:\pk-workspace\mysql_data`) when mounting the folder
- you can avoid relabelling (the `z` option) when you mount a local filesystem
- setting the machine to run in rootful mode (`podman machine stop && podman machine set --rootful && podman machine start`) and specifying user `1000` when running the container (`podman run --user 1000:1000 ...`) makes it work

rootful mode is required for MySQL process to manipulate the host filesystem from the VM (note that the process can write successfully but fails while trying to change file permissions to `ca.pem`). If running the VM rootful is a problem you can still use the VM filesystem as MySQL data folder (in this case relabelling is required):

```pwsh
> podman machine ssh mkdir /tmp/mysql_data
> podman run --name mysql-container -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=my_sql_pwd -d -p 3306:3306 -v /tmp/mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql:z mysql:latest
```

Other options to use rootless mode:
- use a named volume rather than bind mount
- [configure WSL automounted folders to have metadata enabled](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/wsl/wsl-config) (should slow down file access, [more information](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/commandline/chmod-chown-wsl-improvements/))
Thanks @l0rd , i can able to bring up the mysql container using rootful mode.
